src/capabilities/notes/server/mastery-pr.reason: YUK-559 S2 seed — reads projection .theta_hat/.mastery to emit a note mastery-progress signal, without gating on provenance/isObserved/evidence_count. Acceptable TODAY because both borrow flags (GRAPH_LAPLACIAN_ENABLED / PREREQ_THETA_PROPAGATION_ENABLED) are dark, so getMasteryProjection returns zero inferred entries — the consumer can only ever see observed rows. Before either flag flips, this site must gate on isObserved / evidence_count.

resolves_when.ref: audit:mastery-provenance upgraded to a hard gate when any borrow flag flips on (spec §7 open question 4); this consumer must then gate on isObserved/evidence_count
